# Tasks

Operations related to tasks. Tasks are used to track work items, assignments, and completion status.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/tasks` | List tasks. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/tasks` | Create task. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/tasks/{task_id}` | Delete task. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/tasks/{task_id}` | Get task. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/tasks/{task_id}` | Update task. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/tasks/{task_id}/complete` | Complete task. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/tasks/{task_id}/reinstate` | Reinstate task. | Bearer token required |
